questions.question: In the five-kingdom classification of Whittaker, which kingdom includes prokaryotic organisms that can perform chemosynthesis?
questions.hint: Chemosynthetic bacteria are prokaryotes in Kingdom Monera.
questions.solution: Kingdom Monera contains prokaryotes including autotrophic chemosynthetic bacteria like Nitrosomonas.
